name: Minimum stop loss distance on major pairs
rule_text: Calculate (|Entry - SL| / Entry) × 100 and enforce: USD/SGD/AUD/USD/EUR/CAD minimum 0.15%, USD/CHF minimum 0.20%, QQQ/DIA minimum 0.5%, AUD/JPY minimum 0.05%. Reject entry if below threshold. All 7 losses violated this rule.

name: SL tightness conflict detection across all pairs
rule_text: Before ANY execution, reject trades where AI signal text mentions volatility cushion requirement (e.g., '0.15% SL cushion') but calculated SL distance falls below stated requirement. This internal conflict pattern caused 7 losses across majors and ETFs.

name: Reject tight SL despite strong signal confirmation
rule_text: If AI signal suggests SL tighter than 0.15% on major pairs, override and enforce minimum 0.15-0.20% distance. Signal strength and overbought conditions do not justify violating volatility-based SL rules.

name: Three-violation same-day trading halt rule
rule_text: If 3 or more trades on the same day breach minimum SL thresholds (0.15% for major pairs, 0.20% for USD/CHF, 0.5% for index ETFs), immediately pause all trading and require manual review before next entry. Observed 2026-04-16: USD/SGD (0.074%), USD/CHF (0.086%), AUD/USD (0.144%).

name: Account for intraday volatility in SL placement
rule_text: USD/SGD requires minimum 0.15% SL (0.10-0.15% hourly volatility); USD/CHF requires minimum 0.20% SL (0.15-0.25% intraday volatility); AUD/USD requires minimum 0.15% SL; EUR/CAD requires minimum 0.15% SL to absorb normal intraday price movement.

name: Pre-execution SL calculation verification checklist
rule_text: Before ANY entry execution, calculate actual SL distance as (|Entry - SL| / Entry) × 100. For USD/SGD, AUD/USD, EUR/CAD: reject if result < 0.15%. For USD/CHF: reject if result < 0.20%. This is mandatory pre-trade validation.

name: Validate SL distance before any trade execution
rule_text: Calculate SL distance as (|Entry - SL| / Entry) × 100 and verify against instrument minimums BEFORE order submission. All 7 losses failed this pre-execution validation. Require manual confirmation that SL meets minimum before clicking execute.

name: Reject trades with SL under 0.15% on majors
rule_text: Before entry execution, reject any trade setup where calculated SL distance is below 0.15% on major currency pairs (USD/SGD, USD/CHF, AUD/USD, EUR/CAD). This is a hard filter; adjust position size or TP instead of tightening SL.

name: AI acknowledgment vs execution compliance check
rule_text: When AI signal acknowledges volatility requirements (e.g., '0.15% SL cushion') but execution violates those requirements, flag as critical conflict and reject entry. Execute only when AI suggestion aligns with stated requirement. All 6 losses show AI warning that was then ignored in execution.

name: Critical: prevent SL tighter than volatility requirement
rule_text: Reject any entry where AI explicitly acknowledges volatility requirement (e.g., '0.15% SL cushion') but proposed SL distance falls below that threshold. All 6 losses show AI warning that was then ignored in execution.

name: Daily halt after 3+ SL violations
rule_text: If 3 or more trades on the same calendar day breach minimum SL thresholds, immediately pause all trading and require manual AI calibration review before resuming. 2026-04-16 had 3 consecutive violations (0.074%, 0.086%, 0.144%).

name: Validate SL distance calculation pre-execution
rule_text: Before executing any trade, manually verify SL distance: (|Entry - SL| / Entry) × 100 must equal or exceed 0.15% for USD/SGD, AUD/USD, EUR/CAD and 0.20% for USD/CHF. Reject entry if calculation falls below threshold.

name: Override AI with instrument volatility minimums
rule_text: When AI signal proposes SL tighter than the instrument's volatility requirement (e.g., AI suggests 0.111% on EUR/CAD but 0.15% minimum required), override and widen SL to meet minimum. Never compromise volatility buffer regardless of signal strength or overbought conditions.

name: Consecutive tight-SL losses signal strategy error
rule_text: If 3+ trades in one day violate SL minimum rules (0.074%, 0.086%, 0.144% vs. 0.15% requirement), halt trading immediately and review AI signal calibration. This pattern indicates systematic undersizing of risk buffers.

name: Pre-execution SL distance validation — mandatory calculation
rule_text: Before ANY trade execution, calculate actual SL distance as (|Entry - SL| / Entry) × 100 and verify it meets instrument-specific minimum: 0.15% for USD/SGD, AUD/USD, EUR/CAD; 0.20% for USD/CHF; 0.5% for QQQ/DIA. Reject entry if calculation falls below threshold. All 6 losses failed this check.

name: Enforce minimum SL distance on index ETFs
rule_text: Set minimum stop loss distance of 0.5% on QQQ and DIA during all market conditions. Reject entries with SL tighter than 0.5%. Adjust position size instead of tightening SL. QQQ 0.302% and DIA 0.280% violations observed.

name: Volatility-stated requirement enforcement — zero tolerance for conflict
rule_text: If AI signal explicitly states a volatility cushion requirement (e.g., '0.15% SL cushion required'), verify calculated SL distance meets or exceeds it. If AI states '0.15% cushion' but calculated SL is 0.111%, 0.074%, 0.086%, or 0.144%, reject entry immediately. This conflict pattern caused all 6 losses.

name: Pre-execution SL validation against volatility
rule_text: Before ANY entry execution, verify that calculated SL distance matches or exceeds the AI signal's stated volatility cushion requirement. If AI states '0.15% cushion required' but calculated SL is 0.111%, 0.074%, 0.086%, or 0.144%, reject entry immediately. This conflict pattern caused all 6 losses.

name: Triple-breach daily SL violation halt protocol
rule_text: If 3 or more trades on the same day breach minimum SL thresholds (0.15% for major pairs, 0.20% for USD/CHF, 0.5% for index ETFs), immediately pause all trading and require manual review before next entry. Indicates systematic signal calibration failure requiring recalibration.

name: Override AI SL suggestions below volatility threshold
rule_text: When AI signal proposes SL tighter than the instrument's volatility requirement (e.g., AI suggests 0.111% on EUR/CAD but 0.15% minimum required), override and widen SL to meet minimum. Never compromise volatility buffer regardless of signal strength.

name: Multi-loss daily pattern halt protocol
rule_text: If 2 or more losses occur on the same calendar day (2026-04-16: USD/SGD 0.074%, USD/CHF 0.086%, AUD/USD 0.144%), immediately halt all trading and require manual AI calibration review before resuming. Do not execute additional trades that day.

name: Single-day tight SL pattern detection
rule_text: If 3 trades on same day all breach 0.15% minimum SL threshold (0.074%, 0.086%, 0.144% observed 2026-04-16), immediately pause trading and require manual review before next entry. Indicates systematic signal calibration failure.

name: Currency pairs require minimum 0.15-0.20% SL
rule_text: For USD/SGD, AUD/USD, EUR/CAD: enforce minimum 0.15% SL distance. For USD/CHF: enforce minimum 0.20% SL distance. Reject any entry where calculated SL distance falls below these thresholds. This pattern repeated across 4 losses.

name: Maximum entry slippage on index ETFs
rule_text: Never enter more than 0.25% above the AI signal price on DIA. DIA signal 494.34 but entry at 497.18 = 0.58% premium violated this; reject and wait for pullback to preserve setup integrity. Loss: 2026-04-21.

name: Entry price premium cap on index ETFs
rule_text: Never enter more than 0.25% above the AI signal price on any index ETF (QQQ, DIA). If entry premium exceeds 0.25%, cancel and wait for pullback. DIA entry at 497.18 vs signal 494.34 (0.58% premium) caused loss 2026-04-21.

name: Halt trading on multi-loss calendar days — manual review required
rule_text: If 2 or more losses occur on the same calendar day (2026-04-16: USD/SGD 0.074%, USD/CHF 0.086%, AUD/USD 0.144%), immediately halt all trading and require manual AI calibration review before resuming. Do not execute additional trades that day.

name: Three-trade daily SL violation halt rule
rule_text: If 3 or more trades on the same calendar day breach minimum SL thresholds (0.15% for majors, 0.20% for USD/CHF, 0.5% for ETFs), immediately pause all trading. 2026-04-16 had 3 consecutive violations (0.074%, 0.086%, 0.144%). Requires manual AI recalibration.

name: Index ETF entry premium cap: 0.25% above AI signal price
rule_text: Never enter more than 0.25% above the AI signal price on any index ETF (QQQ, DIA). If entry premium exceeds 0.25%, cancel and wait for pullback. DIA entry at 497.18 vs signal 494.34 (0.58% premium) caused loss 2026-04-21.

name: Minimum SL distance 0.05% on emerging pairs
rule_text: For AUD/JPY, enforce minimum SL distance of 0.05% (5 pips minimum). Reject entries with SL tighter than 0.05% to avoid bid-ask spread slippage. Loss 2026-05-05 had SL only 0.017% from entry.
